case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JINA NAM et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT NAM, JINA HAM, YOUNG WHAN KANG, JOUNG MI DOES 1 TO 20, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP; FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT NAM, JINA HAM, YOUNG WHAN KANG, JOUNG MI
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NAM, JINA HAM, YOUNG WHAN KANG, JOUNG MI

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (AMENDED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT NAM, JINA HAM, YOUNG WHAN KANG, JOUNG MI
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAM, JINA HAM, YOUNG WHAN KANG, JOUNG MI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1147 G OZBOURN CT., TREASURE ISLAND, SAN FRANCISCO, 94130 $6,539.27 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,539.27, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT AND REINSTATE ACTION JUDGMENT OF JAN-19-2012 SET ASIDE
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT NAM, JINA HAM, YOUNG WHAN KANG, JOUNG MI
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $62.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO VACATE UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND REINSTATE ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NAM, JINA HAM, YOUNG WHAN KANG, JOUNG MI
